text.content:
- MAXAM Tire continues to strengthen its off-the-road product offering with the introduction of a new 45/65R45 size in the MS406 E4/L4 tire line. Designed to meet the demands of heavy loader applications, the expanded size delivers customers another high-value option built for performance, durability and long-term operating efficiency.

The MS406 features a deep E4/L4 lug pattern engineered to deliver excellent traction while providing high wear and cut resistance in demanding environments. Its robust tread design maximizes traction in loader applications, helping fleets improve productivity while achieving a lower cost-per-hour over the life of the tire.

rich_text.plain_text:
- MAXAM Tire continues to strengthen its off-the-road product offering with the introduction of a new 45/65R45 size in the MS406 E4/L4 tire line. Designed to meet the demands of heavy loader applications, the expanded size delivers customers another high-value option built for performance, durability and long-term operating efficiency.

The MS406 features a deep E4/L4 lug pattern engineered to deliver excellent traction while providing high wear and cut resistance in demanding environments. Its robust tread design maximizes traction in loader applications, helping fleets improve productivity while achieving a lower cost-per-hour over the life of the tire.

text.content:
Built with a deep undertread, the MS406 offers enhanced puncture resistance to better withstand harsh jobsite conditions. A high-quality casing supports excellent retreadability, extending tire life and improving overall value. The wide, flat footprint further enhances stability, delivering consistent performance and confidence when operating under heavy loads.

“With the addition of the 45/54R45 size, we’re continuing to respond directly to market needs while expanding access to a proven loader tire,” said Jimmy McDonnell, Vice President of Sales and Marketing at MAXAM Tire North America. “Our focus is always on delivering market-leading value and tires that perform in real-world conditions while helping customers control operating costs.”

To learn more about the MS406, visit
